security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Explore, query and compare JSON locally.
bundle.longDescription: A private desktop workspace for exploring, querying and comparing JSON. All data stays on your computer.
